teaser: Shares of McCormick rose after reporting better-than-expected Q2 FY24 earnings. The company posted sales of $1.643 billion, slightly above the $1.637 billion consensus. Adjusted EPS of $0.69 beat estimates of $0.59, with a gross profit margin expanding to 37.7%.

title: Why Food Company McCormick Shares Are Shooting Higher Today
